title: When Sweet Moonlight Is Sleeping in the Hills
original_title: Wenn süß das Mondlicht auf den Hügeln schläft
overview: Based on a book by Eric Malpass and directed by Kurt Hoffmann, the film focuses on the everyday life of a German family perceived through the eyes of its youngest member — six-year-old Gaylord.
